sub_modules.gradient_derivative: Combinational fixed-point derivative calculator for f'(x) = 2*a*x + b using widened signed arithmetic.
sub_modules.gradient_step: Combinational fixed-point learning-rate multiplier that computes alpha times the derivative with Q-format rescaling.
sub_modules.gradient_update: Combinational update subtractor that computes the next widened x value from the current x and scaled step.
sub_modules.fixed_truncate: Combinational narrowing block that returns the low N bits of the widened fixed-point update.
